summary: Adds Phase 3 Blu-ray.com local catalog, search, watchlist, editions, UPC, drift, history, and sitemap sync commands.
reason: The generated API-style sync and HTML link extraction cannot implement the approved sitemap-backed offline catalog and local price-history workflows.
validated_outcome: go build ./... and go vet ./... pass with GOCACHE=/tmp/blu-ray-pp-cli-gocache; touched package tests pass.
